meaning: 江苏(位于中国东部沿海、长江下游)
examples: About 1,200 guests who were born in Jiangsu attended the first Jiangsu Development Summit in Nanjing.
In 1955, polio broke out in Nantong, Jiangsu Province.
Xiang Chenxi is a beautiful girl from Wuxi, Jiangsu Province.
David Ji was born Ji Long Fen on Aug. 5, 1952 in Jintan, Jiangsu Province.
The provinces of Jiangsu, Zhejiang, Fujian and Anhui are bracing for severe power shortages this summer.
